test_corpus.reason: Compact (5K docs, 300 queries), has ground-truth relevance labels, standard IR benchmark recognized by the OSSYM audience

ragas_judge.fallback: If scores look nonsensical (everything >0.95 or <0.1), note the limitation and fall back to a cloud API, disclosing it in results

embedding_model_preference.selection_method: Pick top MTEB retrieval-ranked model that fits in residual memory

generation_model_preference.reason: 273 GB/s bandwidth is the bottleneck on DGX Spark. MoE models that only activate a fraction of parameters per token will be significantly faster than dense models of equivalent total size.
generation_model_preference.fallback_dense: Qwen2.5-32B-Q4 if no MoE GGUF is available or download is too slow

inference_backend.reason: Best GGUF support, confirmed working on GB10 with CUDA
